name: @cap/sandbox
description: CAP sandbox provider center, provider-neutral lifecycle/workspace helpers, and adapter facade.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @cap/contracts build && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-core build && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-environment build && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-cloud-http build && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-provider-aio build && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-provider-boxlite build && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-conformance build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @cap/contracts build && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-core build && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-environment build && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-cloud-http build && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-provider-aio build && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-provider-boxlite build && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-conformance build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: pnpm build && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-conformance build && node test/provider-center.test.mjs && node test/provider-conformance.test.mjs && node test/staged-workspace-git.test.mjs && node test/boxlite-workspace-adapter.test.mjs && node test/host-harness-config.test.mjs && node test/host-harness-configured-provider.test.mjs && node test/host-harness-image-parameters.test.mjs && node test/host-harness-command-executor.test.mjs && node --test test/model-material.test.mjs && node test/host-harness-terminal.test.mjs && node test/host-harness-workspace-bridge.test.mjs && node test/host-harness-provider-terminal-story.test.mjs && node test/terminal-reconnect.test.mjs
scripts.coverage: pnpm build && pnpm --filter @cap/sandbox-conformance build && c8 --100 --include=dist/**/*.js --reporter=text sh -c "node test/provider-center.test.mjs && node test/provider-conformance.test.mjs && node test/staged-workspace-git.test.mjs && node test/boxlite-workspace-adapter.test.mjs && node test/host-harness-config.test.mjs && node test/host-harness-configured-provider.test.mjs && node test/host-harness-image-parameters.test.mjs && node test/host-harness-command-executor.test.mjs && node test/host-harness-terminal.test.mjs && node test/host-harness-workspace-bridge.test.mjs && node test/host-harness-provider-terminal-story.test.mjs && node test/terminal-reconnect.test.mjs"
